name: lookupDistObj
title: lookupDistObj
description: Obtains an object by using a string.
A downcast can be used to get a more concrete type.

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: Fully qualified name of the object.

return:
Object with the given path.
Invalid object if nothing was found.
availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
